basics.name: Rohit Anand
basics.label: Data Analyst at S&P Global
basics.summary: MBA Business Analytics professional transforming complex datasets into actionable financial intelligence. Expert in SQL, Power BI, and Advanced Excel.

bullets: Extracting investor transaction datasets via SQL and Excel, validating and reconciling records.
Built a standardized HR metric dictionary.
Built an AI agent for People Analytics queries.
Reduced manual reporting effort by 35% via automation.
Developed ARIMA + LSTM forecasting models with ~95% accuracy.
